name: mercury-agent
description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.
readme_summary: Mercury is a soul-driven AI agent designed for continuous operation, offering permission-hardened tools, robust memory, and multi-channel access via CLI or Telegram. It prioritizes user control with a pending approval flow and structured memory management.
key_features: Permission-hardened tools with shell blocklist and folder-level scoping
SQLite-backed Second Brain memory with auto-extraction and conflict resolution
Soul-driven personality defined by user-owned markdown files
Token-aware with daily budget enforcement and auto-conciseness
Live streaming output to CLI and Telegram
Always-on daemon mode with auto-restart and crash recovery
Extensible skills based on Agent Skills specification
primary_use_case: To provide a secure, persistent, and user-controlled AI agent that can run 24/7, assisting users through various channels while maintaining a structured memory and respecting defined permissions.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, old librarian meticulously organizing a vast, glowing library where each book represents a piece of information. The librarian consults a small, ethereal tablet before placing a new scroll onto a shelf, symbolizing the agent asking for permission before acting. Around the library, subtle digital streams of data flow, and small, stylized icons represent different tools and communication channels (like a chat bubble and a command line prompt). The overall mood is one of careful stewardship and intelligent organization, with a clean, slightly futuristic aesthetic. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing clarity and order.

name: witr
readme_summary: witr is a command-line tool and TUI application that visualizes the causal chain of running processes, services, and network connections. It aims to answer the question "Why is this running?" by explicitly showing the origin, startup method, and responsible systems for any given process or service.
key_features: Answers "Why is this running?"
Visualizes process causality
Interactive TUI mode
Explains origin and startup chain
Supports Linux, macOS, Windows, FreeBSD
Distributes as a single static binary
Available via multiple package managers
primary_use_case: Debugging and understanding the origin and dependencies of running processes, services, and network connections on a system.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old tree with deep roots, where each root represents a different system process or service. A single glowing fruit hanging from a branch symbolizes a running application. The tree's trunk shows a clear, illuminated path tracing back from the fruit through various interconnected branches and smaller roots, revealing the causal chain of how the fruit came to be. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float around the roots, indicating the underlying technology. The background is a clean, minimalist digital landscape. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear visual storytelling and a warm, informative color palette.

name: CloakBrowser
description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
readme_summary: CloakBrowser is a stealth-focused Chromium browser designed to bypass bot detection systems. It functions as a drop-in replacement for Playwright and Puppeteer, offering a real Chromium binary with source-level fingerprint patches to appear as a legitimate user browser.
key_features: 49 source-level C++ patches for various browser fingerprints (canvas, WebGL, audio, etc.)
`humanize=True` flag for human-like mouse, keyboard, and scroll patterns
Achieves a 0.9 reCAPTCHA v3 score
Passes Cloudflare Turnstile, FingerprintJS, and BrowserScan (30+ detection sites)
Auto-updating Chromium binary
Easy installation via pip or npm
Free and open source
primary_use_case: Bypassing bot detection mechanisms on websites to enable automated browsing and web scraping tasks that would otherwise be blocked.
cover_image_prompt: A digital chameleon seamlessly blending into a crowd of diverse, anonymous figures. The chameleon, subtly incorporating the 'CloakBrowser' logo, is actively changing its 'skin' to match the patterns and textures of the surrounding figures, representing its ability to mimic legitimate user fingerprints. In the background, faint, abstract representations of bot detection systems (like digital tripwires or scanning beams) are being effortlessly bypassed by the chameleon. The overall mood is one of stealth and successful infiltration, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of blues and greens, suggesting security and success. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clear visual metaphors.

name: OpenPostings
readme_summary: OpenPostings is an open-source job aggregator and application tracking system that consolidates job postings from over 100,000 companies across numerous Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). It allows users to filter jobs by various criteria and manage their application lifecycle, including assisted workflows for cover letters and candidate selection.
key_features: Aggregates job postings from multiple ATS providers into a local database
Filters job postings by search text, ATS, industry, region, country, state, county, and remote mode
Tracks applied/ignored posting status and application lifecycle
Stores applicant profiles and MCP agent settings in SQLite
Provides MCP tools for candidate selection, cover-letter drafting, and result recording
Offers client applications for Web, Android, and Windows
Includes a local Node/Express API and a Chrome extension for capturing job data
primary_use_case: To centralize and streamline the job search and application process by aggregating job postings from various sources and providing tools to manage applications.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic filing cabinet labeled 'OpenPostings' stands in a bustling, organized office. It has multiple drawers, each representing a different ATS (visualized as distinct company logos or stylized icons). From these drawers, streams of colorful job postings (represented as small scrolls or digital cards) flow into a central, glowing 'inbox' on the cabinet's surface. A helpful robot hand is shown sorting these postings, applying filters like 'remote' or 'industry' with subtle digital overlays. The background shows a clean, modern workspace with a large window overlooking a city. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a bright, optimistic color palette, emphasizing efficiency and accessibility.

name: open-design
description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.
readme_summary: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design, enabling users to generate web, desktop, and mobile prototypes, slides, images, and videos. It leverages a variety of coding agents and design systems to automate and enhance the design process, offering sandboxed previews and multiple export options.
key_features: Local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design
Supports 16 coding-agent CLIs (e.g., Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI) and BYOK proxy
Drives design with 31 composable Skills and 72 brand-grade Design Systems
Generates web, desktop, and mobile prototypes, slides, images, and videos
Offers sandboxed preview and export to HTML, PDF, PPTX, and MP4
Auto-detects coding agents on PATH
primary_use_case: Automating and accelerating the creation of digital prototypes, design systems, and visual assets by integrating local coding agents with a comprehensive library of design resources.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a workshop, using a magical loom to weave intricate digital tapestries that represent websites and apps. The loom is fed with raw code snippets and design elements (like color swatches and icons) from various sources. As the artisan works, the tapestries materialize into fully formed, interactive prototypes. Subtle glowing lines connect the artisan's tools to a nearby screen displaying the Open Design logo and a simplified UI. The workshop is filled with organized shelves of design system components. The overall style is a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a touch of magic.

name: ai-file-sorter
description: Cross-platform desktop application for content-aware file organization and renaming. Supports local and remote LLMs, preview-based workflows, and fully user-controlled changes.
readme_summary: AI File Sorter is a cross-platform desktop application that uses artificial intelligence to intelligently organize and rename files like images, documents, audio, and video. It offers a privacy-first approach by supporting local LLMs and providing preview-based workflows for user-controlled file management.
key_features: Content-aware file organization and renaming
Supports local and remote LLMs (e.g., Gemma 3 4B IT)
Visual LLM backends for image analysis
Analyzes document content for renaming suggestions
Uses metadata for audio/video file renaming
Privacy-first design with local-only processing option
Preview-based workflows for user control
Combines LLM output with taxonomy matching and caching
Cross-platform desktop application (Windows, macOS, Linux)
primary_use_case: To automatically organize and rename files on a user's desktop or storage devices using AI, making them easier to find and manage.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic filing cabinet with a glowing AI brain on top, actively sorting a chaotic pile of mixed files (photos, documents, music notes) into neat, labeled drawers. Each file being sorted transforms from a messy, generic shape into a clear, descriptive icon representing its content. Subtle digital particles and lines of code flow around the cabinet, indicating intelligent processing. The scene is set in a clean, organized digital workspace with soft, ambient lighting. The overall style should be a charming 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing clarity and helpfulness, with the 'AI File Sorter' name subtly integrated into a label on one of the drawers.
